name: Plaid
description: Read Plaid (bank-linking, transactions, balances, identity, liabilities, investments) from any AI agent. 10 tools, body-credential auth.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Plaid REST API (per-environment).

**Setup**:
1. Sign up at https://dashboard.plaid.com → **Team Settings → Keys**. Note your `client_id` and one of: `sandbox`, `development`, `production` secret.
2. **Environment matters**: change baseUrl: `sandbox.plaid.com` (free, fake banks), `development.plaid.com` (real banks, 100 free items), `production.plaid.com` (paid). Defaults to sandbox.
3. Set `PLAID_CLIENT_ID` and `PLAID_SECRET`.

**Authentication**: every POST sends `client_id` + `secret` in the JSON body — NOT as headers. The adapter merges them automatically via envVars.

**Link flow**: Plaid is server+client — to obtain an `access_token`, your frontend uses Plaid Link with a `link_token` you minted server-side. This adapter assumes you already have an `access_token` for an Item (one connected bank). For Link itself use `plaid_link_token_create`.

**Identifiers**:
- `link_token`: short-lived (~30 min), passed to Link.
- `public_token`: returned by Link, exchanged once for an access_token.
- `access_token`: long-lived, scoped to one Item (institution+user).
- `item_id`: stable ID for an access_token's Item.

**Rate limits**: vary by environment + product. Sandbox is loose; production limits depend on plan. 429 with `Retry-After`.

**Out of scope here**: webhooks setup, Plaid Signal (risk scores), Income/Employment products' end-user flows, Transfer (ACH origination).

tools.name: plaid_link_token_create
tools.description: Create a short-lived link_token to pass to the Plaid Link client. The client returns a public_token after the user authenticates with their bank; exchange that for an access_token via plaid_item_public_token_exchange.

user_client_user_id.description: Your unique ID for this end-user (will be associated with the Item).

client_name.description: Display name shown in Link UI.

products.description: Array: transactions, auth, identity, assets, investments, liabilities, ...

tools.name: plaid_item_public_token_exchange
tools.description: Exchange a public_token (from Plaid Link) for a long-lived access_token + item_id.

tools.name: plaid_item_get
tools.description: Get metadata about an Item (institution, products, billed products, status, error).

tools.name: plaid_accounts_get
tools.description: List accounts for an Item with name, mask, type (depository, credit, loan, investment), subtype.

tools.name: plaid_accounts_balance_get
tools.description: Get real-time balances for an Item's accounts (may trigger a refresh — slower than accounts_get).

tools.name: plaid_transactions_get
tools.description: Get transactions in a date range (up to 730 days back). Paginated via `count` + `offset`. Note: for ongoing sync prefer `/transactions/sync`.

tools.name: plaid_transactions_sync
tools.description: Incremental transactions sync. Pass `cursor` from previous response (empty string for first call). Returns `added`, `modified`, `removed`, `next_cursor`, `has_more`.

tools.name: plaid_identity_get
tools.description: Get identity info attached to the Item's accounts (names, emails, addresses, phone numbers).

tools.name: plaid_auth_get
tools.description: Get bank routing + account numbers for ACH/EFT setup. Requires `auth` product on the Item.

tools.name: plaid_institutions_search
tools.description: Search Plaid's catalog of supported financial institutions by name + country.

products.description: Array of products the institution must support.
